CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANAME, MIGUEL BEKER, YULIYA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF MIGUEL CHANAME, YULIYA BEKER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY [SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE] AND FOR MONEY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE OPPOSITION DOES NOT DISPUTE THE MOTION ON THE MERITS. TO THE EXTENT VALID AND RESPONSIVE RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED BY THE DATE OF THIS HEARING, SUCH WILL SATISFY THE REQUIREMENTS OF THIS ORDER. MONEY SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $550 ARE AWARDED, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. WRITTEN RESPONSES ARE DUE WITHIN 15 CALENDAR DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE CURTIS A. KARNOW. NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Answers To Written Discovery And For Sanction
Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
DANIEL V. TABAKH, ESQ., (510)288-8737, FOR PLAINTIFFS/MOVING PARTIES, MIGUEL CHANAME, YULIYA BEKER
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE DEFENDANT

Tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL CHANAME, YULIYA BEKER's Motion To Compel Answers to Written Discovery [Special Interrogatories, Set One, Form Interrogatories, Set One, Request for Production of Documents, Set One, Requests for Admission, Set One] and for money sanctions is granted. The opposition does not dispute the motion on the merits. To the extent valid and responsive responses have been served by the date of this hearing, such will satisfy the requirements of this order. Money sanctions in the sum of $550 are awarded, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Written responses are due within 15 calendar days of notice of this order. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Curtis A. Karnow. Not reported. (CK/610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Set For Trial On Jul-26-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-21-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 602
